case_title: VERONIKA LOPAUROVA ET AL VS. YEE JU RIDDELL ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NOTIVE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPAUROVA, VERONIKA
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING: FEB-01-2023 AT 8:30AM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPAUROVA, VERONIKA

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPAUROVA, VERONIKA CANTOR, CHRISTOPHER LOPAUR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIDDELL, YEE JU LIN-CHU, HANN-FONG $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT RIDDELL, YEE JU LIN-CHU, HANN-FONG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-01-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-01-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF VERONIKA LOPAUROVA (OWNER) IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER LOPAUR (COUSIN) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YEE JU RIDDELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HANNA LIN (TRUE NAME: HANN-FONG LIN-CHU) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENTS ID PROOF FOR TRUE NAME TO COURTROOM CLERK. PROOF OF SERVICE BY SUBSTITUTE SERVICE FILED ON JAN 12-2023 ON DEFENDANTS YEE JU RIDDELL AND HANNA LIN SERVED ON JAN-05-2023 IS 3 DAYS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANTS YEE JU RIDDELL AND HANN-FONG LIN-CHU WAIVE SERVICES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK:DEFENDANT (LIN-CHU HANN FONG) EXHIBITS RETURNED AT THE WINDOW.PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LOPAUROVA, VERONIKA CANTOR, CHRISTOPHER LOPAUR AS TO DEFENDANT RIDDELL, YEE JU LIN-CHU, HANN-FONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
